response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned, versatile software engineer with genuine staff-level breadth, strong TypeScript credentials, and directly relevant recent exposure to MCP servers and agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires a minimum of 8 years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year; there is no evidence of Python proficiency, vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks. His customer-facing teaching and consulting background is a plus, but the core AI depth gap against explicit required qualifications is too large for this particular staff GenAI role.
strengths: Recent hands-on experience with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, a listed key technology
15+ years of production software engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems with strong TypeScript/Node.js skills
Proven mentorship and stakeholder-facing skills via workshops, courses, conference talks, and consulting roles
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of AI-adjacent work)
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation, or frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Python is absent from the resume, and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) is not tied to AI system design

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI solution experience vs. 8-year requirement
Missing RAG/vector database and multi-agent framework expertise
MCP and agentic tooling experience plus staff-level engineering breadth
